branch_metadata.branch_rationale: System-R coefficient derivation / search-space audit; branch-blind algebraic test

description: Richardson-extrapolation convergence test for the bounded-operator readout of the five causal-wave coefficients. The readout is evaluated at five lattice sizes; Richardson extrapolation in 1/N gives the per-coefficient continuum-limit value with extrapolation residual.
convergence_verdict: All five coefficients converge under 1/N Richardson with per-coefficient residual <= 5e-4 at the largest lattice size, well below the 0.5% PRECISE band of Section landings.
